title: Limbfree
content:
{{Top|ca|leg|notoc=1}} {{Character |type=CIS |image= |name=Limbfree |homeworld= |birth= |death=By [[19 BBY/Legends|19 BBY]], [[New Plympto/Legends|New Plympto]][[Dark Times 1|''Dark Times'' 1]] states that it takes place approximately nineteen [[Standard year/Legends|years]] before the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]], which ''[[The New Essential Chronology]]'' dates to [[0 BBY/Legends|0 BBY]]. The comic issue also takes place on [[New Plympto/Legends|New Plympto]], therefore, Limbfree must have been [[Death/Legends|killed]] there by [[19 BBY/Legends|19 BBY]]. |species= |gender= |pronouns= |height= |mass= |hair= |feathers= |eyes= |skin= |cyber= |families= |parents= |partners= |siblings= |children= |affiliation=*[[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]][[Dark Times 1|''Dark Times'' 1]] *[[Separatist holdouts/Legends|Separatist holdouts]] **[[New Plympto resistance (Imperial Period)|New Plympto resistance]] |masters= |apprentices= }} {{Quote|Jennir! Where's General Rootrock?''"
"''Dead.''"
"''Commander Limbfree?''"
"''Dead.|Bomo Greenbark learns of Limbfree's death from Dass Jennir|}} '''Limbfree''' was an individual who, by [[19 BBY/Legends|19 BBY]],[[Dark Times 1|''Dark Times'' 1]] states Limbfree was a [[Commander/Legends|commander]] and that the comic issue takes place approximately 19 [[Standard year/Legends|years]] before the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]], which ''[[The New Essential Chronology]]'' dates to [[0 BBY/Legends|0 BBY]]. Therefore, Limbree must have held the rank by [[19 BBY/Legends|19 BBY]]. held the rank of [[Commander/Legends|commander]] in the [[Nosaurian/Legends|Nosaurian]] [[New Plympto resistance (Imperial Period)|resistance]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[New Plympto/Legends|New Plympto]]. The resistance sided with the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]] and fought against the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] and, later once the war was over, their successor state, the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]]. With the main Separatist forces gone, the Imperial forces continued fighting the Nosaurians, who were now considered a [[Separatist holdouts/Legends|Separatist holdout]], as part of the [[Cleansing of New Plympto]]. It was during this fighting that Limbfree was [[Death/Legends|killed]]. After he had finished evacuating young and [[Gender/Legends|female]] Nosaurians, the Nosaurian [[Captain/Legends|captain]] [[Bomo Greenbark]] asked the [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Dass Jennir]] as to Limbfree's location, but was informed of the commander's demise. ==Behind the scenes== Limbfree was first mentioned in the [[Star Wars comic books|comic book]] series ''[[Star Wars: Dark Times]]'' within the [[Dark Times 1|first]] issue of the [[Star Wars: Dark Times: The Path to Nowhere|''The Path to Nowhere'']] arc, which was written by Mick Harrison, a pen name of [[Randy Stradley]],{{InsiderCite|127|Blaster}} and released in [[November 8]], [[2006]].{{Marvel|url=comics/issue/54075/star_wars_dark_times_2006_1|text=Star Wars: Dark Times (2006) #1}} ==Appearances== *[[Dark Times 1|''Dark Times'' 1]] {{1stm}} ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |de=Limbfree |pl=Limbfree }} [[Category:Individuals of unspecified gender]] [[Category:Individuals of unspecified species]] [[Category:Individuals with unspecified pronouns]] [[Category:Resistance fighters]] [[Category:Separatist holdouts individuals]] [[Category:Separatist officers]]
